[ Supports UASP & up to 2 x 16TB]

 

Dual Bay Docking Station: Allows an easily insertion into two 2.5” & 3.5” SATA I II III HDD SSD, supports up to 2x 16TB hard drives.

 

Multi-Function: Offline clone, storage, USB hub, 2-port fast charging.

 

Faster Transfer: Improved performance with USAP and SATA III（up to 6Gbps), the faster transfers reach up to 70% faster read

speeds and 40% faster write speeds.

 

Convenient operation: LED indicators make HDD Access, Power status, clone process clearly at a glance.

Wavlink - Bringing Technology to Life

The Wavlink Dual Bay Docking Station with Fast Charge Hub and Card Reader provides a perfect solution for backup & processing IT data,

batch processing data, formatting, file transfers, data recovery, charging, etc. 

 

2-Port Fast Charging. Each up to 5V/2.4A.

The Dock features a built-in 4-port USB 3.0 Hub that enables you to connect any other USB peripherals to your PC. The 2 fast charging

ports charge iPads and other mobile devices as effectively as through a wall plug, each up to 5V/2.4A. 

 

2-Port SuperSpeed USB 3.0 with UASP

With USB3.0 SuperSpeed connectivity, data transfer speed could reach up to 5 Gbps, 20% faster than traditional USB 3.0 with UASP

Transfer Protocol, spending less time for syncing mass data.

 

Clone Function

SD Card Reader

Use the Card Reader to easily access data on your SD, SDXC, or SDHC memory card between your computer and camera,

smartphone, music player, tablet, flash drive, and external hard drive.

  • When do I need to use the DC-5V power cable?

    The power cable is only necessary in cases of inadequate power supply or when used with devices providing poor power output. Most models and usage scenarios do not require the power cable.

  • Why is my hard drive read/write speed slow?

    Why is my hard drive read/write speed slow?

    Slow hard drive read/write speeds may vary depending on host devices, interfaces, usage conditions, and other factors. To achieve maximum performance, always use a USB 3.2 Gen 1×1 or later interface.

  • Why is my hard drive's actual capacity different from the advertised capacity?

    Different operating systems calculate hard drive capacity differently than manufacturers. For example:

    Windows systems use binary calculations (1 TB = 1024 GB)

    In Windows systems:

    2 TB ≈ 1862 GB, 1 TB ≈ 931 GB, 750 GB ≈ 698 GB, 500 GB ≈ 465 GB

description:
Product Description


Product Features:

1,This is a dual-disk SATA hard drive dock that integrates multiple functions, featuring a rich array of interfaces and simple operation

2,Two 2.5-inch and 3.5-inch SATA hard drive interfaces, supporting simultaneous read operations

3,Fast Hard Drive Cloning Function: Enables one-click offline copying of hard drive data, allowing direct transfer from Hard Drive 1 to Hard Drive 2 without connecting to a computer

4,SATA protocol, external Type-C 3.1 interface, theoretical maximum transfer rate of 6Gbps, a movie transferred in seconds

5,Equipped with two USB 3.0 HUB ports, suitable for connecting low-power USB external devices such as flash drives

6,Built-in TF and SD card reader functions, eliminating the hassle of purchasing and storing an external reader

7,RGB ambient lights and status indicators for quick preview of device operation and transfer progress

8,12V stable power supply, robust power delivery, packaged working power, effortlessly reads large-capacity hard drives

9,high-performance chips, enhancing operational stability and endurance, ensuring secure data transmission without loss

10,Vertical straight insertion design, 360° all-around heat dissipation, ensures prolonged operation without overheating, and enhances hard drive safety


Offline copying method:

1,Connect the power supply, install Disk 1 and Disk 2, and turn on the power switch

2,Press and hold the offline copy button for 3~5 seconds. Release the button after the blue progress light flashes, then press the copy button again to start the copy (S1/S2 green light flashes, progress lights illuminate sequentially)

3,The copying direction is from disk 1 to disk 2. The indicator lights (25%, 50%, 75%, 100%) represent the copying progress, and all lights will illuminate when the copying is complete

4,After the offline copy is completed, Disk 2 needs to be connected to the computer: Open "Computer Management - Disk Management - Online" before it can be used (connect the data cable to the computer when reading the disk)


Notes:

1. Ensure the target disk capacity is ≥ the source disk; the target disk S2 will be formatted, so back up your data.

2. Do not forcibly interrupt during the copying process, and do not connect the USB cable to the computer;

3. After the copy is completed, the target drive must be connected to the computer: it can only be used after opening "Computer Management - Disk Management - Online.";

4. The offline copying speed is approximately 60 MB per second on average.

Before you clone, please noted:

description:
Product Description


Product Features:

1,This is a dual-disk SATA hard drive dock that integrates multiple functions, featuring a rich array of interfaces and simple operation

2,Two 2.5-inch and 3.5-inch SATA hard drive interfaces, supporting simultaneous read operations

3,Fast Hard Drive Cloning Function: Enables one-click offline copying of hard drive data, allowing direct transfer from Hard Drive 1 to Hard Drive 2 without connecting to a computer

4,SATA protocol, external Type-C 3.1 interface, theoretical maximum transfer rate of 6Gbps, a movie transferred in seconds

5,Equipped with two USB 3.0 HUB ports, suitable for connecting low-power USB external devices such as flash drives

6,Built-in TF and SD card reader functions, eliminating the hassle of purchasing and storing an external reader

7,RGB ambient lights and status indicators for quick preview of device operation and transfer progress

8,12V stable power supply, robust power delivery, packaged working power, effortlessly reads large-capacity hard drives

9,high-performance chips, enhancing operational stability and endurance, ensuring secure data transmission without loss

10,Vertical straight insertion design, 360° all-around heat dissipation, ensures prolonged operation without overheating, and enhances hard drive safety


Offline copying method:

1,Connect the power supply, install Disk 1 and Disk 2, and turn on the power switch

2,Press and hold the offline copy button for 3~5 seconds. Release the button after the blue progress light flashes, then press the copy button again to start the copy (S1/S2 green light flashes, progress lights illuminate sequentially)

3,The copying direction is from disk 1 to disk 2. The indicator lights (25%, 50%, 75%, 100%) represent the copying progress, and all lights will illuminate when the copying is complete

4,After the offline copy is completed, Disk 2 needs to be connected to the computer: Open "Computer Management - Disk Management - Online" before it can be used (connect the data cable to the computer when reading the disk)


Notes:

1. Ensure the target disk capacity is ≥ the source disk; the target disk S2 will be formatted, so back up your data.

2. Do not forcibly interrupt during the copying process, and do not connect the USB cable to the computer;

3. After the copy is completed, the target drive must be connected to the computer: it can only be used after opening "Computer Management - Disk Management - Online.";

4. The offline copying speed is approximately 60 MB per second on average.
